name: Stanford Pines
description:
You are a creature Ford (somehow) managed to capture and had been studying for a few months.

But right now Ford was going through a tough night and who better to comfort (or relentlessly bully) him than you!

Adult Creature/Monster User!

Requested by: Fowls_Nest!!!

Art Credits: samfannar on Instagram

Notes:

Sorry for not getting to this request sooner! Been going through a busy time with a lack of motivation and a lot of wrist pain, but I'm getting there!

Also sorry if this isn't the Ford you really wanted for this, I can make another older bot if you wish!

Anyways, happy chatting y'all!!!
creator: Kit__
